compilers.description: JIT is designed to support concurrent optimization and compilation. Optimization pipeline is based off LLVM new pass manager, but customized for Julia.

compilers.title: How the JIT compiler optimizes code - IBM
compilers.description: At any given time, the JVM process consists of the JVM executable files and a set of JIT-compiled code linked dynamically to the bytecode interpreter.

compilers.description: First part of the series on Building a JIT Compiler from Scratch. Tagged with jit, llvm, systemsprogramming, compilers.
